entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: Sorghum bicolor (l.) moench, the crop studied for shoot fly resistance

entities.name: SHOOT FLY
entities.description: Atherigona soccata Rondani, the pest causing infestation in sorghum

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics, Patancheru, Andhra Pradesh, India

entities.name: RAINY SEASON
entities.description: The rainy season during 1992-93

entities.name: POSTRAINY SEASON
entities.description: The postrainy season during 1991-92

entities.name: SHOOT FLY INFESTATION
entities.description: Conditions where shoot fly is present and attacking the crop

entities.name: UNINFESTED CONDITION
entities.description: Conditions where shoot fly is absent

entities.name: COMPLETELY RANDOMISED BLOCK DESIGN
entities.description: The experimental design used to conduct the study

entities.name: STATISTICAL ANALYSES
entities.description: Used to estimate mean performance and genetic variances for different traits

entities.name: PATH ANALYSES
entities.description: Used to determine the direct and indirect effects of morphological and agronomic traits on shoot fly resistance

entities.name: INFESTOR ROWTFISH MEAL TECHNIQUE
entities.description: Technique used to ensure high levels of shoot fly infestation

entities.name: SHOOT FLY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum genotypes to resist attack by shoot fly

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced, which is affected by shoot fly infestation

entities.name: PERCENTAGE PLANTS WITH EGGS
entities.description: A parameter used to measure shoot fly resistance

entities.name: NUMBER OF EGGS PER 100 PLANTS
entities.description: A parameter used to measure shoot fly resistance

entities.name: DEADHEART PERCENTAGE
entities.description: A parameter used to measure shoot fly resistance

entities.name: TRICHOME DENSITY
entities.description: The density of trichomes on the plant, contributing to resistance in dwarf genotypes

entities.name: GLOSSINESS INTENSITY
entities.description: The level of glossiness of the plant, a neutral trait for selection in both tall and dwarf groups

entities.name: LEAF LENGTH
entities.description: The length of the leaves, contributing to resistance in dwarf genotypes

entities.name: LEAF DROOPINESS
entities.description: The degree of leaf drooping, contributing to resistance in tall genotypes

entities.name: EARLY PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The height of the plant in the early stage of development, contributing to resistance in tall genotypes

entities.name: VIGOUR
entities.description: The overall growth strength of the plant, a neutral trait for selection

entities.name: OVIPOSITIONAL PREFERENCE
entities.description: The preference of shoot flies to lay eggs on specific genotypes

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation due to genetic factors

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The expected genetic improvement in a trait

entities.name: FEMALE LINES
entities.description: Dwarf lines used in sorghum breeding schemes

entities.name: RESTORER LINES
entities.description: Tall lines used in sorghum breeding schemes
